text: Ada Lovelace wrote notes on the Analytical Engine. She invented the C programming language.

atomic_facts.fact: Ada Lovelace wrote notes on the Analytical Engine.
atomic_facts.label: Supported

atomic_facts.fact: Ada Lovelace invented the C programming language.
atomic_facts.label: Refuted
atomic_facts.source: C was developed in the 1970s by Dennis Ritchie.
